Toll Plaza) Regulations, 2026.
ment
(2) These Regulations shall come into operation on the issuance
of the partial practical completion certificate in accordance with

sections.heading: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires— Interpretation
(1) The Ndola Sakania Road is designated as a toll road. Designation
sections.text:
of toll road
(2) The concessionaire shall operate and maintain the toll road and toll
point
referred to under subregulation (1) in accordance with the Act,
these Regulations and the concession agreement.
(3) The Tom Mtine Toll Plaza is designated as a toll point from
where a toll shall be collected.

sections.heading: (1) A driver of a vehicle in the Republic specified in the First Payment of
sections.text:
Schedule shall, at the point of passing through the toll point, pay to toll
the concessionaire a toll set out in the First Schedule.
(2) Despite subregulation (1), the concessionaire may give a
discount to a frequent road user or a local road user of the toll road
as set out in the Second Schedule.

sections.heading: A road user who buys tolls in bulk shall buy the tolls at the Bulk discount
sections.text:
bulk toll discount rate set out in the Second Schedule. rate
